name: @physicalai-bmi/skillpack
description: The open, cross-vendor, safety-enveloped robot-skill layer. A skill is source you own — a policy, a typed contract, a capability manifest, a safety envelope, an eval — that installs, checks your robot's capabilities before it moves, and runs safely on any body. Composes LeRobot policies.

scripts.test: node verify.mjs && node verify-vla.mjs && node verify-cli.mjs && node verify-flywheel.mjs && node verify-spec.mjs && node verify-mcp.mjs && node verify-bridge.mjs && node verify-eval.mjs && node verify-durable.mjs && node verify-mobile.mjs && node verify-telemetry.mjs && node verify-composite.mjs
scripts.setup:lerobot: python3.13 -m venv .venv-lerobot && .venv-lerobot/bin/pip install -U pip lerobot diffusers num2words 'transformers>=5.4.0,<5.6.0'

author: Institute for Physical AI @ BMI
